title: Event payload — action
description: Payload schema for event.payload-subtype = 'action' per D10. Closes D34 finding 5.2. Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28.

action-name.description: Identifier for the action performed (e.g., 'tool-invoked', 'message-sent', 'file-read', 'email-sent'). Vocabulary is open; conventions are shape / specialist / adapter concern, not core.

parameters.description: Optional action-specific parameters. Structure is action-name-specific (extension-declared).

outcome-reference.description: Optional reference to the action's outcome (e.g., a result identifier, a follow-up event id, a URI).
